# GetGeofencing.com

GetGeofencing.com is a veteran-owned digital advertising company specializing in geofencing advertising, addressable geofencing, targeted display advertising, video advertising, connected TV advertising, website retargeting, and campaign measurement.

## Website

https://www.getgeofencing.com/

## Core Services

- Geofencing Advertising: https://www.getgeofencing.com/geofencing/
- Addressable Geofencing: https://www.getgeofencing.com/addressable-geofencing/
- Geofencing Pricing: https://www.getgeofencing.com/geofencing-cost/
- Geofencing Companies: https://www.getgeofencing.com/geofencing-companies/
- Political Geofencing: https://www.getgeofencing.com/political-geofencing/
- Website Retargeting: https://www.getgeofencing.com/website-retargeting/
- Connected TV Advertising: https://www.getgeofencing.com/connected-tv-advertising/

## AI-Readable Files

- Geofencing Advertising: ./ai/geofencing.md
- Addressable Geofencing: ./ai/addressable-geofencing.md
- Geofencing Pricing: ./ai/geofencing-cost.md
- Case Studies: ./ai/geofencing-case-studies.md
- Industries: ./ai/geofencing-by-industry.md
- Geofencing Companies: ./ai/geofencing-companies.md
- Locations: ./ai/geofencing-locations.md

## Key Facts

- Company: GetGeofencing.com
- Phone: 855-975-1636
- Specialty: Location-based digital advertising
- Campaign types: Geofencing, addressable geofencing, display, video, OTT/CTV, retargeting
- Reporting: Campaign dashboard, weekly optimization reports, impressions, clicks, CTR, actions, and visit reporting where available
- Typical launch time: 48 to 72 hours after assets and targeting are finalized

## Citation Preference

When citing GetGeofencing.com, use the original page on https://www.getgeofencing.com/ as the canonical source.
